name: ppt-composer
description: Image-first PPT generation with MCP-backed parsing and assembly tools: create one finished PNG per slide and assemble those PNGs into PowerPoint decks.

interface.shortDescription: Generate image-first PPTX decks where every slide is one complete PNG.
interface.longDescription: PPT Composer exposes one image-first PPT skill while keeping MCP servers as the internal tool layer for PDF/reference parsing, visual planning, PNG manifest validation, PPTX assembly, and QA. The final deck contains exactly one finished full-slide PNG on each slide.
defaultPrompt: Use this reference file to generate a full-slide PNG image-first PPT.
Create an image-first PPT from this brief; every slide should be one complete PNG.
Generate a unified visual deck and assemble the PNG pages into a PPTX.
